ayahArabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنٰهُ قُرْءٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have made it an Arabic Qur’ān that you might understand.

targetTranslation: as a complete book for recitation
ayahArabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنٰهُ قُرْءٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have made it an Arabic Qur’ān that you might understand.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنٰهُ قُرْءٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have made it an Arabic Qur’ān that you might understand.

targetTranslation: you all understand (so that you all may understand)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنٰهُ قُرْءٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have made it an Arabic Qur’ān that you might understand.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ فِىٓ أُمِّ ٱلْكِتٰبِ لَدَيْنَا لَعَلِىٌّ حَكِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And indeed it is, in the Mother of the Book with Us, exalted and full of wisdom.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ فِىٓ أُمِّ ٱلْكِتٰبِ لَدَيْنَا لَعَلِىٌّ حَكِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And indeed it is, in the Mother of the Book with Us, exalted and full of wisdom.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ فِىٓ أُمِّ ٱلْكِتٰبِ لَدَيْنَا لَعَلِىٌّ حَكِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And indeed it is, in the Mother of the Book with Us, exalted and full of wisdom.

ayahArabic: أَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنكُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَ صَفْحًا أَن كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا مُّسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then should We turn the message away, disregarding you, because you are a transgressing people?

ayahArabic: أَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنكُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَ صَفْحًا أَن كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا مُّسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then should We turn the message away, disregarding you, because you are a transgressing people?

ayahArabic: أَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنكُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَ صَفْحًا أَن كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا مُّسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then should We turn the message away, disregarding you, because you are a transgressing people?

targetTranslation: a people (object of أَفَنَضْرِبُ - should we turn away)
ayahArabic: أَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنكُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَ صَفْحًا أَن كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا مُّسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then should We turn the message away, disregarding you, because you are a transgressing people?

targetTranslation: those who definitely go beyond limits (describes قوما)
ayahArabic: أَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنكُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَ صَفْحًا أَن كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا مُّسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then should We turn the message away, disregarding you, because you are a transgressing people?

ayahArabic: وَكَمْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن نَّبِىٍّ فِى ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And how many a prophet We sent among the former peoples,

ayahArabic: وَكَمْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن نَّبِىٍّ فِى ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And how many a prophet We sent among the former peoples,

targetTranslation: he comes to them (referring to the prophets mentioned in نَّبِىٍّ)
ayahArabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن نَّبِىٍّ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: But there would not come to them a prophet except that they used to ridicule him.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن نَّبِىٍّ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: But there would not come to them a prophet except that they used to ridicule him.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن نَّبِىٍّ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: But there would not come to them a prophet except that they used to ridicule him.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن نَّبِىٍّ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: But there would not come to them a prophet except that they used to ridicule him.

ayahArabic: فَأَهْلَكْنَآ أَشَدَّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا وَمَضَىٰ مَثَلُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We destroyed greater than them in [striking] power, and the example of the former peoples has preceded.

ayahArabic: فَأَهْلَكْنَآ أَشَدَّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا وَمَضَىٰ مَثَلُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We destroyed greater than them in [striking] power, and the example of the former peoples has preceded.

ayahArabic: فَأَهْلَكْنَآ أَشَدَّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا وَمَضَىٰ مَثَلُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We destroyed greater than them in [striking] power, and the example of the former peoples has preceded.

targetTranslation: you asked them (about who created the heavens and earth)
ayahArabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ خَلَقَهُنَّ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: And if you should ask them, "Who has created the heavens and the earth?" they would surely say, "They were created by the Exalted in Might, the Knowing,"

targetTranslation: who (asking about the creator of السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)
ayahArabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ خَلَقَهُنَّ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: And if you should ask them, "Who has created the heavens and the earth?" they would surely say, "They were created by the Exalted in Might, the Knowing,"

ayahArabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ خَلَقَهُنَّ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: And if you should ask them, "Who has created the heavens and the earth?" they would surely say, "They were created by the Exalted in Might, the Knowing,"

targetTranslation: he created them (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ 'the heavens')
ayahArabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ خَلَقَهُنَّ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: And if you should ask them, "Who has created the heavens and the earth?" they would surely say, "They were created by the Exalted in Might, the Knowing,"

targetTranslation: The one who (describes جَعَلَ - the one who made)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The one] who has made for you the earth a bed and made for you upon it roads that you might be guided

targetTranslation: he made (connected to لَكُمُ - for you all)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The one] who has made for you the earth a bed and made for you upon it roads that you might be guided

targetTranslation: a resting place (what Allah made the earth into)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The one] who has made for you the earth a bed and made for you upon it roads that you might be guided

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The one] who has made for you the earth a bed and made for you upon it roads that you might be guided

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The one] who has made for you the earth a bed and made for you upon it roads that you might be guided

targetTranslation: he sent down repeatedly (subject of وَٱلَّذِى - and the One who)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ فَأَنشَرْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا كَذٰلِكَ تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who sends down rain from the sky in measured amounts, and We revive thereby a dead land - thus will you be brought forth -

targetTranslation: water (as the object being sent down)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ فَأَنشَرْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا كَذٰلِكَ تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who sends down rain from the sky in measured amounts, and We revive thereby a dead land - thus will you be brought forth -

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ فَأَنشَرْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا كَذٰلِكَ تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who sends down rain from the sky in measured amounts, and We revive thereby a dead land - thus will you be brought forth -

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ فَأَنشَرْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا كَذٰلِكَ تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who sends down rain from the sky in measured amounts, and We revive thereby a dead land - thus will you be brought forth -

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ فَأَنشَرْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا كَذٰلِكَ تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who sends down rain from the sky in measured amounts, and We revive thereby a dead land - thus will you be brought forth -

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا وَجَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْفُلْكِ وَٱلْأَنْعٰمِ مَا تَرْكَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who created the species, all of them, and has made for you of ships and animals those which you mount

targetTranslation: all of them (referring to الْأَزْوٰجَ - the pairs)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا وَجَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْفُلْكِ وَٱلْأَنْعٰمِ مَا تَرْكَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who created the species, all of them, and has made for you of ships and animals those which you mount

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا وَجَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْفُلْكِ وَٱلْأَنْعٰمِ مَا تَرْكَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who created the species, all of them, and has made for you of ships and animals those which you mount

targetTranslation: you (all) ride (referring to the people who use the ships and animals mentioned)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا وَجَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْفُلْكِ وَٱلْأَنْعٰمِ مَا تَرْكَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who created the species, all of them, and has made for you of ships and animals those which you mount

ayahArabic: لِتَسْتَوُۥا۟ عَلَىٰ ظُهُورِهِۦ ثُمَّ تَذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَةَ رَبِّكُمْ إِذَا ٱسْتَوَيْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ وَتَقُولُوا۟ سُبْحٰنَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ لَنَا هٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُۥ مُقْرِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: That you may settle yourselves upon their backs and then remember the favor of your Lord when you have settled upon them and say, "Exalted is He who has subjected this to us, and we could not have [otherwise] subdued it.

ayahArabic: لِتَسْتَوُۥا۟ عَلَىٰ ظُهُورِهِۦ ثُمَّ تَذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَةَ رَبِّكُمْ إِذَا ٱسْتَوَيْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ وَتَقُولُوا۟ سُبْحٰنَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ لَنَا هٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُۥ مُقْرِنِينَ

ayahEnglish: That you may settle yourselves upon their backs and then remember the favor of your Lord when you have settled upon them and say, "Exalted is He who has subjected this to us, and we could not have [otherwise] subdued it.

ayahEnglish: That you may settle yourselves upon their backs and then remember the favor of your Lord when you have settled upon them and say, "Exalted is He who has subjected this to us, and we could not have [otherwise] subdued it.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed we, to our Lord, will [surely] return."

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلُوا۟ لَهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦ جُزْءًا إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسٰنَ لَكَفُورٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: But they have attributed to Him from His servants a portion. Indeed, man is clearly ungrateful.

targetTranslation: a part (object of جَعَلُوا - they made)

ayahEnglish: But they have attributed to Him from His servants a portion. Indeed, man is clearly ungrateful.

ayahArabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ مِمَّا يَخْلُقُ بَنَاتٍ وَأَصْفَىٰكُم بِٱلْبَنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Or has He taken, out of what He has created, daughters and chosen you for [having] sons?

ayahEnglish: Or has He taken, out of what He has created, daughters and chosen you for [having] sons?

targetTranslation: was given good news (subject is أَحَدُهُم - one of them)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا بُشِّرَ أَحَدُهُم بِمَا ضَرَبَ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ مَثَلًا ظَلَّ وَجْهُهُۥ مُسْوَدًّا وَهُوَ كَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And when one of them is given good tidings of that which he attributes to the Most Merciful in comparison [i.e., a daughter], his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief.

ayahEnglish: So is one brought up in ornaments while being during conflict unevident [attributed to Allāh]?

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عِبٰدُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ إِنٰثًا أَشَهِدُوا۟ خَلْقَهُمْ سَتُكْتَبُ شَهٰدَتُهُمْ وَيُسْـَٔلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they described the angels, who are servants of the Most Merciful, as females. Did they witness their creation? Their testimony will be recorded, and they will be questioned.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عِبٰدُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ إِنٰثًا أَشَهِدُوا۟ خَلْقَهُمْ سَتُكْتَبُ شَهٰدَتُهُمْ وَيُسْـَٔلُونَ

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْ شَآءَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ مَا عَبَدْنٰهُم مَّا لَهُم بِذٰلِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ إِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا يَخْرُصُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they said, "If the Most Merciful had willed, we would not have worshipped them." They have of that no knowledge. They are not but misjudging.

targetTranslation: we worshipped them (referring to false gods mentioned earlier)

ayahEnglish: Or have We given them a book before it [i.e., the Qur’ān] to which they are adhering?

ayahEnglish: Or have We given them a book before it [i.e., the Qur’ān] to which they are adhering?

targetTranslation: they said (responding to what came before)
ayahArabic: بَلْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا عَلَىٰٓ أُمَّةٍ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثٰرِهِم مُّهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Rather, they say, "Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are in their footsteps [rightly] guided."

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ مَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى قَرْيَةٍ مِّن نَّذِيرٍ إِلَّا قَالَ مُتْرَفُوهَآ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا عَلَىٰٓ أُمَّةٍ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثٰرِهِم مُّقْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And similarly, We did not send before you any warner into a city except that its affluent said, "Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are, in their footsteps, following."

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ مَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى قَرْيَةٍ مِّن نَّذِيرٍ إِلَّا قَالَ مُتْرَفُوهَآ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا عَلَىٰٓ أُمَّةٍ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثٰرِهِم مُّقْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And similarly, We did not send before you any warner into a city except that its affluent said, "Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are, in their footsteps, following."

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ مَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى قَرْيَةٍ مِّن نَّذِيرٍ إِلَّا قَالَ مُتْرَفُوهَآ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا عَلَىٰٓ أُمَّةٍ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثٰرِهِم مُّقْتَدُونَ

ayahEnglish: And similarly, We did not send before you any warner into a city except that its affluent said, "Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are, in their footsteps, following."

ayahArabic: قٰلَ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكُم بِأَهْدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمْ عَلَيْهِ ءَابَآءَكُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا بِمَآ أُرْسِلْتُم بِهِۦ كٰفِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Each warner] said, "Even if I brought you better guidance than that [religion] upon which you found your fathers?" They said, "Indeed we, in that with which you were sent, are disbelievers."

ayahArabic: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
ayahEnglish: So We took retribution from them; then see how was the end of the deniers.

ayahArabic: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

ayahArabic: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
ayahEnglish: So We took retribution from them; then see how was the end of the deniers.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرٰهِيمُ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّنِى بَرَآءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when Abraham said to his father and his people, "Indeed, I am disassociated from that which you worship

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرٰهِيمُ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّنِى بَرَآءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when Abraham said to his father and his people, "Indeed, I am disassociated from that which you worship

targetTranslation: free/innocent (from مِمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ - what you worship)

ayahArabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِى فَإِنَّهُۥ سَيَهْدِينِ
ayahEnglish: Except for He who created me; and indeed, He will guide me."

ayahArabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِى فَإِنَّهُۥ سَيَهْدِينِ
ayahEnglish: Except for He who created me; and indeed, He will guide me."

targetTranslation: a word (as the object being made lasting)
ayahArabic: وَجَعَلَهَا كَلِمَةًۢ بَاقِيَةً فِى عَقِبِهِۦ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And he made it a word remaining among his descendants that they might return [to it].

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلَهَا كَلِمَةًۢ بَاقِيَةً فِى عَقِبِهِۦ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And he made it a word remaining among his descendants that they might return [to it].

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلَهَا كَلِمَةًۢ بَاقِيَةً فِى عَقِبِهِۦ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And he made it a word remaining among his descendants that they might return [to it].

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلَهَا كَلِمَةًۢ بَاقِيَةً فِى عَقِبِهِۦ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And he made it a word remaining among his descendants that they might return [to it].

ayahArabic: بَلْ مَتَّعْتُ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ وَءَابَآءَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَرَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: However, I gave enjoyment to these [people of Makkah] and their fathers until there came to them the truth and a clear Messenger.

targetTranslation: came to them (referring to those mentioned earlier in the ayah)
ayahArabic: بَلْ مَتَّعْتُ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ وَءَابَآءَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَرَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: However, I gave enjoyment to these [people of Makkah] and their fathers until there came to them the truth and a clear Messenger.

ayahArabic: بَلْ مَتَّعْتُ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ وَءَابَآءَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَرَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: However, I gave enjoyment to these [people of Makkah] and their fathers until there came to them the truth and a clear Messenger.

ayahArabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْحَقُّ قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا سِحْرٌ وَإِنَّا بِهِۦ كٰفِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But when the truth came to them, they said, "This is magic, and indeed we are, concerning it, disbelievers."

ayahArabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْحَقُّ قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا سِحْرٌ وَإِنَّا بِهِۦ كٰفِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But when the truth came to them, they said, "This is magic, and indeed we are, concerning it, disbelievers."

targetTranslation: was sent down (object of قَالُوا - what they said)
ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانُ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِّنَ ٱلْقَرْيَتَيْنِ عَظِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And they said, "Why was this Qur’ān not sent down upon a great man from [one of] the two cities?"

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانُ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِّنَ ٱلْقَرْيَتَيْنِ عَظِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And they said, "Why was this Qur’ān not sent down upon a great man from [one of] the two cities?"

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانُ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِّنَ ٱلْقَرْيَتَيْنِ عَظِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And they said, "Why was this Qur’ān not sent down upon a great man from [one of] the two cities?"

targetTranslation: Are they? (subject of يَقْسِمُونَ - they distribute)
ayahArabic: أَهُمْ يَقْسِمُونَ رَحْمَتَ رَبِّكَ نَحْنُ قَسَمْنَا بَيْنَهُم مَّعِيشَتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَرَفَعْنَا بَعْضَهُمْ فَوْقَ بَعْضٍ دَرَجٰتٍ لِّيَتَّخِذَ بَعْضُهُم بَعْضًا سُخْرِيًّا وَرَحْمَتُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ مِّمَّا يَجْمَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they distribute the mercy of your Lord? It is We who have apportioned among them their livelihood in the life of this world and have raised some of them above others in degrees [of rank] that they may make use of one another for service. But the mercy of your Lord is better than whatever they accumulate.

ayahArabic: أَهُمْ يَقْسِمُونَ رَحْمَتَ رَبِّكَ نَحْنُ قَسَمْنَا بَيْنَهُم مَّعِيشَتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَرَفَعْنَا بَعْضَهُمْ فَوْقَ بَعْضٍ دَرَجٰتٍ لِّيَتَّخِذَ بَعْضُهُم بَعْضًا سُخْرِيًّا وَرَحْمَتُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ مِّمَّا يَجْمَعُونَ

ayahArabic: وَلَوْلَآ أَن يَكُونَ ٱلنَّاسُ أُمَّةً وٰحِدَةً لَّجَعَلْنَا لِمَن يَكْفُرُ بِٱلرَّحْمٰنِ لِبُيُوتِهِمْ سُقُفًا مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَمَعَارِجَ عَلَيْهَا يَظْهَرُونَ

targetTranslation: your Lord (possessed by you, after عِندَ)
ayahArabic: وَزُخْرُفًا وَإِن كُلُّ ذٰلِكَ لَمَّا مَتٰعُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلْءَاخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And gold ornament. But all that is not but the enjoyment of worldly life. And the Hereafter with your Lord is for the righteous.

ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْشُ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ نُقَيِّضْ لَهُۥ شَيْطٰنًا فَهُوَ لَهُۥ قَرِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And whoever is blinded from remembrance of the Most Merciful - We appoint for him a devil, and he is to him a companion.

ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْشُ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ نُقَيِّضْ لَهُۥ شَيْطٰنًا فَهُوَ لَهُۥ قَرِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And whoever is blinded from remembrance of the Most Merciful - We appoint for him a devil, and he is to him a companion.

ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْشُ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ نُقَيِّضْ لَهُۥ شَيْطٰنًا فَهُوَ لَهُۥ قَرِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And whoever is blinded from remembrance of the Most Merciful - We appoint for him a devil, and he is to him a companion.

targetTranslation: a devil (object of نُقَيِّضْ - we assign)
ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْشُ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ نُقَيِّضْ لَهُۥ شَيْطٰنًا فَهُوَ لَهُۥ قَرِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And whoever is blinded from remembrance of the Most Merciful - We appoint for him a devil, and he is to him a companion.

targetTranslation: a close companion (of him - referring back to مَن in the ayah)
ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْشُ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ نُقَيِّضْ لَهُۥ شَيْطٰنًا فَهُوَ لَهُۥ قَرِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And whoever is blinded from remembrance of the Most Merciful - We appoint for him a devil, and he is to him a companion.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّهُمْ لَيَصُدُّونَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, they [i.e., the devils] avert them from the way [of guidance] while they think that they are [rightly] guided

targetTranslation: when (followed by جَآءَنَا - he came to us)
ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَنَا قَالَ يٰلَيْتَ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَكَ بُعْدَ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرِينُ
ayahEnglish: Until, when he comes to Us [at Judgement], he says [to his companion], "How I wish there was between me and you the distance between the east and west; and what a wretched companion."

targetTranslation: he came to us (subject of قَالَ - he said)
ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَنَا قَالَ يٰلَيْتَ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَكَ بُعْدَ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرِينُ
ayahEnglish: Until, when he comes to Us [at Judgement], he says [to his companion], "How I wish there was between me and you the distance between the east and west; and what a wretched companion."

targetTranslation: he said (introducing what comes next in the ayah)
ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَنَا قَالَ يٰلَيْتَ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَكَ بُعْدَ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرِينُ
ayahEnglish: Until, when he comes to Us [at Judgement], he says [to his companion], "How I wish there was between me and you the distance between the east and west; and what a wretched companion."

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَنَا قَالَ يٰلَيْتَ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَكَ بُعْدَ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرِينُ
ayahEnglish: Until, when he comes to Us [at Judgement], he says [to his companion], "How I wish there was between me and you the distance between the east and west; and what a wretched companion."

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَنَا قَالَ يٰلَيْتَ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَكَ بُعْدَ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرِينُ
ayahEnglish: Until, when he comes to Us [at Judgement], he says [to his companion], "How I wish there was between me and you the distance between the east and west; and what a wretched companion."

ayahArabic: وَلَن يَنفَعَكُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِذ ظَّلَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُشْتَرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And never will it benefit you that Day, when you have wronged, that you are [all] sharing in the punishment.

ayahArabic: وَلَن يَنفَعَكُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِذ ظَّلَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُشْتَرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And never will it benefit you that Day, when you have wronged, that you are [all] sharing in the punishment.

ayahArabic: وَلَن يَنفَعَكُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِذ ظَّلَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُشْتَرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And never will it benefit you that Day, when you have wronged, that you are [all] sharing in the punishment.

targetTranslation: those who share together (in the punishment)
ayahArabic: وَلَن يَنفَعَكُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِذ ظَّلَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُشْتَرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And never will it benefit you that Day, when you have wronged, that you are [all] sharing in the punishment.

ayahArabic: أَفَأَنتَ تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ أَوْ تَهْدِى ٱلْعُمْىَ وَمَن كَانَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then will you make the deaf hear, [O Muḥammad], or guide the blind or he who is in clear error?

targetTranslation: you make (someone) hear (addressing الصُّمَّ - the deaf)
ayahArabic: أَفَأَنتَ تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ أَوْ تَهْدِى ٱلْعُمْىَ وَمَن كَانَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then will you make the deaf hear, [O Muḥammad], or guide the blind or he who is in clear error?

targetTranslation: you guide (addressing the Prophet ﷺ about guiding الْعُمْىَ - the blind)
ayahArabic: أَفَأَنتَ تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ أَوْ تَهْدِى ٱلْعُمْىَ وَمَن كَانَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then will you make the deaf hear, [O Muḥammad], or guide the blind or he who is in clear error?

ayahArabic: أَفَأَنتَ تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ أَوْ تَهْدِى ٱلْعُمْىَ وَمَن كَانَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then will you make the deaf hear, [O Muḥammad], or guide the blind or he who is in clear error?

targetTranslation: a clear state of being lost (after في/in)
ayahArabic: أَفَأَنتَ تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ أَوْ تَهْدِى ٱلْعُمْىَ وَمَن كَانَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then will you make the deaf hear, [O Muḥammad], or guide the blind or he who is in clear error?

ayahArabic: أَفَأَنتَ تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ أَوْ تَهْدِى ٱلْعُمْىَ وَمَن كَانَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then will you make the deaf hear, [O Muḥammad], or guide the blind or he who is in clear error?

targetTranslation: we will definitely go away (threat to those who reject faith)
ayahArabic: فَإِمَّا نَذْهَبَنَّ بِكَ فَإِنَّا مِنْهُم مُّنتَقِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whether [or not] We take you away [in death], indeed, We will take retribution upon them.

ayahArabic: فَإِمَّا نَذْهَبَنَّ بِكَ فَإِنَّا مِنْهُم مُّنتَقِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whether [or not] We take you away [in death], indeed, We will take retribution upon them.

targetTranslation: we will surely show you (object of وَعَدْنٰهُمْ)
ayahArabic: أَوْ نُرِيَنَّكَ ٱلَّذِى وَعَدْنٰهُمْ فَإِنَّا عَلَيْهِم مُّقْتَدِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or whether [or not] We show you that which We have promised them, indeed, We are Perfect in Ability.

targetTranslation: the one which/that/who (referring back to what we will show you)
ayahArabic: أَوْ نُرِيَنَّكَ ٱلَّذِى وَعَدْنٰهُمْ فَإِنَّا عَلَيْهِم مُّقْتَدِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or whether [or not] We show you that which We have promised them, indeed, We are Perfect in Ability.

ayahArabic: أَوْ نُرِيَنَّكَ ٱلَّذِى وَعَدْنٰهُمْ فَإِنَّا عَلَيْهِم مُّقْتَدِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or whether [or not] We show you that which We have promised them, indeed, We are Perfect in Ability.

targetTranslation: those who are truly powerful (subject of فَإِنَّا)
ayahArabic: أَوْ نُرِيَنَّكَ ٱلَّذِى وَعَدْنٰهُمْ فَإِنَّا عَلَيْهِم مُّقْتَدِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or whether [or not] We show you that which We have promised them, indeed, We are Perfect in Ability.

targetTranslation: it was revealed (object of فَٱسْتَمْسِكْ - so hold fast to)
ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَمْسِكْ بِٱلَّذِىٓ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ صِرٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: So adhere to that which is revealed to you. Indeed, you are on a straight path.

ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَمْسِكْ بِٱلَّذِىٓ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ صِرٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: So adhere to that which is revealed to you. Indeed, you are on a straight path.

ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَمْسِكْ بِٱلَّذِىٓ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ صِرٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: So adhere to that which is revealed to you. Indeed, you are on a straight path.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَذِكْرٌ لَّكَ وَلِقَوْمِكَ وَسَوْفَ تُسْـَٔلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, it is a remembrance for you and your people, and you [all] are going to be questioned.

ayahArabic: وَسْـَٔلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رُّسُلِنَآ أَجَعَلْنَا مِن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ءَالِهَةً يُعْبَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?

ayahArabic: وَسْـَٔلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رُّسُلِنَآ أَجَعَلْنَا مِن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ءَالِهَةً يُعْبَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?

ayahArabic: وَسْـَٔلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رُّسُلِنَآ أَجَعَلْنَا مِن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ءَالِهَةً يُعْبَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?

ayahArabic: وَسْـَٔلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رُّسُلِنَآ أَجَعَلْنَا مِن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ءَالِهَةً يُعْبَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?

targetTranslation: did we make/establish? (asking about آلِهَةً - gods)
ayahArabic: وَسْـَٔلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رُّسُلِنَآ أَجَعَلْنَا مِن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ءَالِهَةً يُعْبَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?

ayahArabic: وَسْـَٔلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رُّسُلِنَآ أَجَعَلْنَا مِن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ءَالِهَةً يُعْبَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?

targetTranslation: deities (as objects being worshipped in يُعْبَدُونَ)
ayahArabic: وَسْـَٔلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رُّسُلِنَآ أَجَعَلْنَا مِن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ءَالِهَةً يُعْبَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?

targetTranslation: they are worshipped (referring to false gods in آلِهَةً)
ayahArabic: وَسْـَٔلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رُّسُلِنَآ أَجَعَلْنَا مِن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ءَالِهَةً يُعْبَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَقَالَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And certainly did We send Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his establishment, and he said, "Indeed, I am the messenger of the Lord of the worlds."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَقَالَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And certainly did We send Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his establishment, and he said, "Indeed, I am the messenger of the Lord of the worlds."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَقَالَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And certainly did We send Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his establishment, and he said, "Indeed, I am the messenger of the Lord of the worlds."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَقَالَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And certainly did We send Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his establishment, and he said, "Indeed, I am the messenger of the Lord of the worlds."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَقَالَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And certainly did We send Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his establishment, and he said, "Indeed, I am the messenger of the Lord of the worlds."

targetTranslation: he came to them (subject of يَضْحَكُونَ - they laugh)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِذَا هُم مِّنْهَا يَضْحَكُونَ
ayahEnglish: But when he brought them Our signs, at once they laughed at them.

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِذَا هُم مِّنْهَا يَضْحَكُونَ
ayahEnglish: But when he brought them Our signs, at once they laughed at them.

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِذَا هُم مِّنْهَا يَضْحَكُونَ
ayahEnglish: But when he brought them Our signs, at once they laughed at them.

targetTranslation: we show them (referring to the signs/miracles mentioned in مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ)
ayahArabic: وَمَا نُرِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ إِلَّا هِىَ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ أُخْتِهَا وَأَخَذْنٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister, and We seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return [to faith].

ayahArabic: وَمَا نُرِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ إِلَّا هِىَ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ أُخْتِهَا وَأَخَذْنٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister, and We seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return [to faith].

ayahArabic: وَمَا نُرِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ إِلَّا هِىَ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ أُخْتِهَا وَأَخَذْنٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister, and We seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return [to faith].

ayahArabic: وَمَا نُرِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ إِلَّا هِىَ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ أُخْتِهَا وَأَخَذْنٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister, and We seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return [to faith].

ayahArabic: وَمَا نُرِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ إِلَّا هِىَ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ أُخْتِهَا وَأَخَذْنٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister, and We seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return [to faith].

ayahEnglish: And We showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister, and We seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return [to faith].

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ يٰٓأَيُّهَ ٱلسَّاحِرُ ٱدْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ بِمَا عَهِدَ عِندَكَ إِنَّنَا لَمُهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they said [to Moses], "O magician, invoke for us your Lord by what He has promised you. Indeed, we will be guided."

ayahEnglish: But when We removed from them the affliction, at once they broke their word.

ayahArabic: وَنَادَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ فِى قَوْمِهِۦ قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ أَلَيْسَ لِى مُلْكُ مِصْرَ وَهٰذِهِ ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِىٓ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And Pharaoh called out among his people; he said, "O my people, does not the kingdom of Egypt belong to me, and these rivers flowing beneath me; then do you not see?

ayahEnglish: So he bluffed his people, and they obeyed him. Indeed, they were [themselves] a people defiantly disobedient [of Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَلَمَّا ضُرِبَ ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ مَثَلًا إِذَا قَوْمُكَ مِنْهُ يَصِدُّونَ
ayahEnglish: And when the son of Mary was presented as an example, immediately your people laughed aloud.

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوٓا۟ ءَأٰلِهَتُنَا خَيْرٌ أَمْ هُوَ مَا ضَرَبُوهُ لَكَ إِلَّا جَدَلًۢا بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ خَصِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they said, "Are our gods better, or is he?" They did not present it [i.e., the comparison] except for [mere] argument. But, [in fact], they are a people prone to dispute.

ayahEnglish: And if We willed, We could have made [instead] of you angels succeeding [one another] on the earth.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَعِلْمٌ لِّلسَّاعَةِ فَلَا تَمْتَرُنَّ بِهَا وَٱتَّبِعُونِ هٰذَا صِرٰطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, he [i.e., Jesus] will be [a sign for] knowledge of the Hour, so be not in doubt of it, and follow Me. This is a straight path.

ayahArabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَ عِيسَىٰ بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ قَالَ قَدْ جِئْتُكُم بِٱلْحِكْمَةِ وَلِأُبَيِّنَ لَكُم بَعْضَ ٱلَّذِى تَخْتَلِفُونَ فِيهِ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَكَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [You] who believed in Our verses and were Muslims.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَكَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [You] who believed in Our verses and were Muslims.

targetTranslation: all of you enter! (command to a group)
ayahArabic: ٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْجَنَّةَ أَنتُمْ وَأَزْوٰجُكُمْ تُحْبَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Enter Paradise, you and your kinds, delighted."

ayahArabic: ٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْجَنَّةَ أَنتُمْ وَأَزْوٰجُكُمْ تُحْبَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Enter Paradise, you and your kinds, delighted."

ayahArabic: ٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْجَنَّةَ أَنتُمْ وَأَزْوٰجُكُمْ تُحْبَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Enter Paradise, you and your kinds, delighted."

targetTranslation: it is being circled around (passive voice, referring to what happens in Paradise)
ayahArabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِصِحَافٍ مِّن ذَهَبٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشْتَهِيهِ ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلْأَعْيُنُ وَأَنتُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Circulated among them will be plates and vessels of gold. And therein is whatever the souls desire and [what] delights the eyes, and you will abide therein eternally.

ayahArabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِصِحَافٍ مِّن ذَهَبٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشْتَهِيهِ ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلْأَعْيُنُ وَأَنتُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Circulated among them will be plates and vessels of gold. And therein is whatever the souls desire and [what] delights the eyes, and you will abide therein eternally.

ayahArabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِصِحَافٍ مِّن ذَهَبٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشْتَهِيهِ ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلْأَعْيُنُ وَأَنتُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Circulated among them will be plates and vessels of gold. And therein is whatever the souls desire and [what] delights the eyes, and you will abide therein eternally.

ayahArabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِصِحَافٍ مِّن ذَهَبٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشْتَهِيهِ ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلْأَعْيُنُ وَأَنتُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Circulated among them will be plates and vessels of gold. And therein is whatever the souls desire and [what] delights the eyes, and you will abide therein eternally.

targetTranslation: ones who last forever (describing أَنتُمْ 'you all')
ayahArabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِصِحَافٍ مِّن ذَهَبٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشْتَهِيهِ ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلْأَعْيُنُ وَأَنتُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Circulated among them will be plates and vessels of gold. And therein is whatever the souls desire and [what] delights the eyes, and you will abide therein eternally.

ayahArabic: وَتِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِىٓ أُورِثْتُمُوهَا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And that is Paradise which you are made to inherit for what you used to do.

targetTranslation: you all were made to inherit it
ayahArabic: وَتِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِىٓ أُورِثْتُمُوهَا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And that is Paradise which you are made to inherit for what you used to do.

ayahArabic: وَتِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِىٓ أُورِثْتُمُوهَا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And that is Paradise which you are made to inherit for what you used to do.

targetTranslation: you (all) do/perform (referring to the deeds that earned you Paradise)
ayahArabic: وَتِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِىٓ أُورِثْتُمُوهَا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And that is Paradise which you are made to inherit for what you used to do.

ayahArabic: لَكُمْ فِيهَا فٰكِهَةٌ كَثِيرَةٌ مِّنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: For you therein is much fruit from which you will eat.

ayahArabic: لَكُمْ فِيهَا فٰكِهَةٌ كَثِيرَةٌ مِّنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: For you therein is much fruit from which you will eat.

ayahArabic: لَكُمْ فِيهَا فٰكِهَةٌ كَثِيرَةٌ مِّنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: For you therein is much fruit from which you will eat.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the criminals will be in the punishment of Hell, abiding eternally.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the criminals will be in the punishment of Hell, abiding eternally.

targetTranslation: those who remain forever (plural, in a regular case)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the criminals will be in the punishment of Hell, abiding eternally.

ayahArabic: لَا يُفَتَّرُ عَنْهُمْ وَهُمْ فِيهِ مُبْلِسُونَ
ayahEnglish: It will not be allowed to subside for them, and they, therein, are in despair.

targetTranslation: those who are in despair (subject of هُمْ)
ayahArabic: لَا يُفَتَّرُ عَنْهُمْ وَهُمْ فِيهِ مُبْلِسُونَ
ayahEnglish: It will not be allowed to subside for them, and they, therein, are in despair.

targetTranslation: we wronged them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: وَمَا ظَلَمْنٰهُمْ وَلٰكِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We did not wrong them, but it was they who were the wrongdoers.

targetTranslation: they were (plural masculine subject of ٱلظَّالِمِينَ)
ayahArabic: وَمَا ظَلَمْنٰهُمْ وَلٰكِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We did not wrong them, but it was they who were the wrongdoers.

ayahArabic: وَمَا ظَلَمْنٰهُمْ وَلٰكِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We did not wrong them, but it was they who were the wrongdoers.

ayahArabic: وَنَادَوْا۟ يٰمٰلِكُ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ قَالَ إِنَّكُم مَّاكِثُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they will call, "O Mālik, let your Lord put an end to us!" He will say, "Indeed, you will remain."

ayahArabic: وَنَادَوْا۟ يٰمٰلِكُ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ قَالَ إِنَّكُم مَّاكِثُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they will call, "O Mālik, let your Lord put an end to us!" He will say, "Indeed, you will remain."

ayahArabic: وَنَادَوْا۟ يٰمٰلِكُ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ قَالَ إِنَّكُم مَّاكِثُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they will call, "O Mālik, let your Lord put an end to us!" He will say, "Indeed, you will remain."

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ جِئْنٰكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَكُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كٰرِهُونَ
ayahEnglish: We had certainly brought you the truth, but most of you, to the truth, were averse.

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ جِئْنٰكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَكُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كٰرِهُونَ
ayahEnglish: We had certainly brought you the truth, but most of you, to the truth, were averse.

targetTranslation: those who dislike/hate (describes أَكْثَر - most of you)
ayahArabic: لَقَدْ جِئْنٰكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَكُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كٰرِهُونَ
ayahEnglish: We had certainly brought you the truth, but most of you, to the truth, were averse.

targetTranslation: they made (something) firm (subject of فَإِنَّا مُبْرِمُونَ)
ayahArabic: أَمْ أَبْرَمُوٓا۟ أَمْرًا فَإِنَّا مُبْرِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they devised [some] affair? But indeed, We are devising [a plan].

targetTranslation: a matter/affair (object of أَبْرَمُوا - they determined)
ayahArabic: أَمْ أَبْرَمُوٓا۟ أَمْرًا فَإِنَّا مُبْرِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they devised [some] affair? But indeed, We are devising [a plan].

targetTranslation: those who make firm (subject of أَبْرَمُوٓا۟)
ayahArabic: أَمْ أَبْرَمُوٓا۟ أَمْرًا فَإِنَّا مُبْرِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they devised [some] affair? But indeed, We are devising [a plan].

targetTranslation: they think/consider (that they know what أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ - that We do not hear)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ سِرَّهُمْ وَنَجْوَىٰهُم بَلَىٰ وَرُسُلُنَا لَدَيْهِمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they think that We hear not their secrets and their private conversations? Yes, [We do], and Our messengers [i.e., angels] are with them recording.

targetTranslation: we hear (the سِرَّهُمْ secret of them)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ سِرَّهُمْ وَنَجْوَىٰهُم بَلَىٰ وَرُسُلُنَا لَدَيْهِمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they think that We hear not their secrets and their private conversations? Yes, [We do], and Our messengers [i.e., angels] are with them recording.

targetTranslation: their secret (object of نَسْمَعُ - we hear)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ سِرَّهُمْ وَنَجْوَىٰهُم بَلَىٰ وَرُسُلُنَا لَدَيْهِمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they think that We hear not their secrets and their private conversations? Yes, [We do], and Our messengers [i.e., angels] are with them recording.

targetTranslation: with them, near them, in their presence (subjects of يَكْتُبُونَ)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ سِرَّهُمْ وَنَجْوَىٰهُم بَلَىٰ وَرُسُلُنَا لَدَيْهِمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they think that We hear not their secrets and their private conversations? Yes, [We do], and Our messengers [i.e., angels] are with them recording.

targetTranslation: they write (our messengers write their secrets)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ سِرَّهُمْ وَنَجْوَىٰهُم بَلَىٰ وَرُسُلُنَا لَدَيْهِمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they think that We hear not their secrets and their private conversations? Yes, [We do], and Our messengers [i.e., angels] are with them recording.

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِن كَانَ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ وَلَدٌ فَأَنَا۠ أَوَّلُ ٱلْعٰبِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "If the Most Merciful had a son, then I would be the first of [his] worshippers."

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِن كَانَ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ وَلَدٌ فَأَنَا۠ أَوَّلُ ٱلْعٰبِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "If the Most Merciful had a son, then I would be the first of [his] worshippers."

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِن كَانَ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ وَلَدٌ فَأَنَا۠ أَوَّلُ ٱلْعٰبِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "If the Most Merciful had a son, then I would be the first of [his] worshippers."

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِن كَانَ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ وَلَدٌ فَأَنَا۠ أَوَّلُ ٱلْعٰبِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "If the Most Merciful had a son, then I would be the first of [his] worshippers."

targetTranslation: glorified, exalted above all imperfection (describes رَبِّ)
ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ رَبِّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَرْشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is the Lord of the heavens and the earth, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.

targetTranslation: Lord of (السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ - the heavens and earth)
ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ رَبِّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَرْشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is the Lord of the heavens and the earth, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.

targetTranslation: Lord of (السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ - the heavens and earth)
ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ رَبِّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَرْشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is the Lord of the heavens and the earth, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.

targetTranslation: they describe (referring to those who attribute false things to Allah)
ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ رَبِّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَرْشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is the Lord of the heavens and the earth, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.

targetTranslation: they plunge into (connected to فَذَرْهُمْ - so leave them)
ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised.

targetTranslation: they meet with/encounter (in the future, referring to يَوْمَهُمُ - their Day)
ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised.

targetTranslation: their day (object of يُلٰقُوا - they meet)
ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised.

ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised.

targetTranslation: they are promised (referring to those who are playing and amusing themselves)
ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِلٰهٌ وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلٰهٌ وَهُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: And it is He [i.e., Allāh] who is [the only] deity in the heaven, and on the earth [the only] deity. And He is the Wise, the Knowing.

targetTranslation: a deity/god (in the heavens and earth)
ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِلٰهٌ وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلٰهٌ وَهُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: And it is He [i.e., Allāh] who is [the only] deity in the heaven, and on the earth [the only] deity. And He is the Wise, the Knowing.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِلٰهٌ وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلٰهٌ وَهُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: And it is He [i.e., Allāh] who is [the only] deity in the heaven, and on the earth [the only] deity. And He is the Wise, the Knowing.

targetTranslation: the One who (referring to Allah in this context)
ayahArabic: وَتَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And blessed is He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them and with whom is knowledge of the Hour and to whom you will be returned.

ayahArabic: وَتَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And blessed is He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them and with whom is knowledge of the Hour and to whom you will be returned.

targetTranslation: between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
ayahArabic: وَتَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And blessed is He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them and with whom is knowledge of the Hour and to whom you will be returned.

ayahArabic: وَتَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And blessed is He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them and with whom is knowledge of the Hour and to whom you will be returned.

ayahArabic: وَتَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And blessed is He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them and with whom is knowledge of the Hour and to whom you will be returned.

ayahArabic: وَلَا يَمْلِكُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلشَّفٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَن شَهِدَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.

ayahArabic: وَلَا يَمْلِكُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلشَّفٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَن شَهِدَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.

ayahArabic: وَلَا يَمْلِكُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلشَّفٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَن شَهِدَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.

ayahArabic: وَلَا يَمْلِكُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلشَّفٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَن شَهِدَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.

ayahArabic: وَلَا يَمْلِكُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلشَّفٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَن شَهِدَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.

targetTranslation: he bore witness (to الْحَقِّ - the truth)
ayahArabic: وَلَا يَمْلِكُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلشَّفٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَن شَهِدَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.

ayahArabic: وَلَا يَمْلِكُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلشَّفٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَن شَهِدَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.

targetTranslation: you asked them (speaking to one person about multiple people)
ayahArabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ فَأَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if you asked them who created them, they would surely say, "Allāh." So how are they deluded?

ayahArabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ فَأَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if you asked them who created them, they would surely say, "Allāh." So how are they deluded?

targetTranslation: created them (referring to the people being asked)
ayahArabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ فَأَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if you asked them who created them, they would surely say, "Allāh." So how are they deluded?

ayahArabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ فَأَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if you asked them who created them, they would surely say, "Allāh." So how are they deluded?

targetTranslation: they are turned away (from the truth)
ayahArabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ فَأَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if you asked them who created them, they would surely say, "Allāh." So how are they deluded?

ayahArabic: وَقِيلِهِۦ يٰرَبِّ إِنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [Allāh acknowledges] his saying, "O my Lord, indeed these are a people who do not believe."

ayahArabic: وَقِيلِهِۦ يٰرَبِّ إِنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [Allāh acknowledges] his saying, "O my Lord, indeed these are a people who do not believe."

ayahArabic: فَٱصْفَحْ عَنْهُمْ وَقُلْ سَلٰمٌ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: So turn aside from them and say, "Peace." But they are going to know.

targetTranslation: they know (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in the ayah)
ayahArabic: فَٱصْفَحْ عَنْهُمْ وَقُلْ سَلٰمٌ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: So turn aside from them and say, "Peace." But they are going to know.
